objective: Level 1 rebound-window smoke for regime_evidence, compact PM context, compact analyst output, and compact reasoning logs on the 8-stock A-share pool.

variables.custom: Only market window changes from Jan weak window to Feb rebound window. Fixed: 8-stock pool, model, data tools, fixed indicators, RiskGuard, PM_EXPERIMENT_MODE=regime_target_exposure, PM_CONTEXT_MODE=compact, ANALYST_OUTPUT_MODE=compact, REASONING_LOG_MODE=compact.

fixed_indicators.description: Fixed trend snapshot: close, SMA20/SMA60, MACD, RSI14.
Fixed momentum/risk snapshot: 5d/10d/20d returns and 20d volatility.
